message:
Emit EventTurnLimit for round limit per spec 2.8

Both MaxTurns and MaxToolRoundsPerInput now emit TURN_LIMIT events
before returning their respective errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -833,6 +833,7 @@ func (s *Session) processOneInput(ctx context.Context, input string) (string, er
 		}
 	}
 
+	s.emit(EventTurnLimit, map[string]any{"max_tool_rounds_per_input": s.cfg.MaxToolRoundsPerInput})
 	s.mu.Lock()
 	s.state = SessionIdle
 	s.mu.Unlock()
